summary: Iteration 6 first-finish testing. 8/8 backend flows PASS (payment auto-paid on completion, atomic stock rejection with 409, multi-item rollback, concurrent 5x create with stock=2 → exactly 2 succeed/3 rejected/final=0, restore on cancel + no double-restore, restore on delete, re-decrement on reactivation from cancel, UPI custom upi_id override). Frontend KPI clickable navigation all 5 targets PASS. CRITICAL BUG: /app/invoices and /app/expenses render both '₹' AND '$' side-by-side (e.g. '₹$6740.00') — 27 dollar signs on invoices, 6 on expenses — because JSX uses '₹${expr}' without backticks so '$' is literal text.
passed: T1 PAYMENT AUTO-PAID: completing an unpaid order sets payment_status=paid; reverting to pending keeps payment_status=paid (no auto-reset)
T2 INSUFFICIENT STOCK: qty=stock+1 returns 409 'Insufficient stock for X. Available: N, requested: N+1', stock unchanged
T3 MULTI-ITEM ROLLBACK: mixed order (A qty=1 ok, B qty=999999 over) returns 409 and A stock rolled back to original (27→27)
T4 CONCURRENCY: 5 parallel POST /api/orders with stock=2 → 2 x 200 + 3 x 409, final stock=0, never negative
T5 RESTORE ON CANCEL: qty=2 order cancelled restores stock; second cancel is idempotent (no double restore)
T6 RESTORE ON DELETE: DELETE /api/orders/{id} restores stock
T7 REACTIVATE: cancel then set back to pending re-decrements stock by 1
T8 UPI CUSTOM: GET /api/payments/upi-link?amount=100&upi_id=custom@paytm returns upi_link with pa=custom%40paytm (overrides saved settings)
KPI CLICKS: Revenue→/app/reports, Orders→/app/orders, Customers→/app/customers, Products→/app/products, Employees→/app/employees all navigate correctly

failed.issue: Amount cells on Invoices and Expenses render literal '₹$' prefix (e.g. 'Total tracked: ₹$6740.00', row amounts '₹$120.00'). Root cause: JSX children use '₹${expr}' — this is NOT a template literal (no backticks around JSX child text), so '$' is rendered as literal character.
failed.evidence: Screenshot of /app/expenses shows '₹$6740.00', '₹$120.00', etc. grep on /app/frontend/src/pages/Invoices.jsx lines 87-89 and /app/frontend/src/pages/Expenses.jsx lines 58,79 confirm '₹${...}' pattern. Frontend '$' count: invoices=27, expenses=6 (matches ₹ count exactly — both symbols present on every amount).

action_items: Fix /app/frontend/src/pages/Invoices.jsx lines 87-89 and /app/frontend/src/pages/Expenses.jsx lines 58, 79: replace '₹${(x).toFixed(2)}' with '₹{(x).toFixed(2)}' (remove the '$' character; JSX child expressions use plain curly braces, not template literals). After fix, dollar-count on both pages should be 0.
Optionally verify 15s live-refresh in Orders/Dashboard was not deep-tested here — inspect setInterval in Dashboard.jsx and Orders.jsx (main-agent claim, code-level check only).

success_rate.frontend: 80% (KPI clicks pass; currency bug on 2 pages)
